clip_summaries.subject: skateboarder landing a kickflip on a downtown plaza ledge at golden hour
clip_summaries.description: wide tracking shot, warm golden hour with hard shadows, smooth landing in final third

labels.ideal_content_profile: Skate-spot lifestyle, trick-attempt sequences, urban hard-light b-roll.
Action-sport landings, friend hype reactions, sun-flare golden hour b-roll.
Rolling skate-line clips, trick attempts, rhythmic momentum b-roll.
Wide hero-moment shots — solo athletes against landscapes, slow lift on payoff.
Quiet handheld b-roll, intimate moments, slow color grades.
Slapstick fails, pet chaos, exaggerated reaction faces.
